prestazioni: MAHLE Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR) for the 3.4L MA1.22 (981.2) flat-six, paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods and ARP L19 head studs for 500+ HP reliability on E85
Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tial 50mm external dump valve and Vibrant 1799 resonated muffler
Motec M150 ECU with PDK transmission control, integrated with a Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 high-pressure fuel pump and ID1000x injectors, calibrated for 30psi boost on 93 octane
estetica: RWB Kyoto widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and custom-machined aluminum fender spacers for aggressive stance
Full Porsche GT4 Clubsport front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter and custom 3D-printed air curtains, paired with a TechArt rear diffuser and side skirts in gloss black
OMP Carbon Kevlar racing seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, wrapped in custom Alcantara with Porsche crest embroidery, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel in perforated leather
